facebook.caption: POV: you're in Phu Quoc craving something that isn't seafood for the 5th day straight. You find Nhà hàng Chay Minh Tâm on Đ. 30 Tháng 4. 4.6 stars, 262 reviews, and every plate is 100% vegan. Locals eat here regularly. The menu is long, the portions are real, and nothing feels like a compromise. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Plates arriving at Nhà hàng Chay Minh Tâm. Full vegan menu, 4.6 stars, 262 reviews. This is what eating well in Phu Quoc actually looks like.
